title: Product Manager (m/f/d) OR Solutions
required_skills: Bachelor's degree and/or 3+ years equivalent experience in product management
Strong understanding of clinical workflows, preferably in the operating room environment
Experience with IT Solutions in hospitals or operating room area is an advantage
bonus_skills: Experience with OR scheduling, media management, OR integration, or patient flow management solutions
matched_skills: Completed degree (Master, Leuphana) — satisfies degree requirement
Fluent English (C1) — satisfies English fluency requirement (company language)
Experience presenting in larger forums: 300+ attendee town halls at HSBC, C-suite sprint reviews at Hapag-Lloyd — satisfies presentation requirement
Go-to-market strategy and product operations: 4 product launches at Intelligent Power Corporation, 6 product lines at GRG Banking — satisfies roadmap implementation experience
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination: Product, Engineering, Marketing interface at HSBC — partially satisfies product management cross-functional requirement
Market and competitive intelligence: competitive analysis at ECE Group, market trends analysis at Hapag-Lloyd — partially satisfies marketing bonus
missing_skills: No clinical workflow knowledge or healthcare IT experience — the core domain of this role
No OR (operating room) environment knowledge whatsoever
No experience with hospital IT solutions, OR scheduling, media management, or patient flow management
No product lifecycle management in a regulated medical device or healthcare software context
No regulatory requirements experience (MDR, CE marking for medical devices)
No cloud application or SaaS product management for healthcare platforms
No user research or usability studies in clinical environments
core_responsibilities: Own entire product lifecycle from strategy and development to launch and continuous improvement
Manage business performance of OR Solutions product portfolio
Collaborate with R&D, Marketing, Sales, Regulatory, and clinical experts
Identify and prioritise market and customer needs; translate into differentiated offerings
Lead user research and usability studies with designers, developers, and research teams
Support go-to-market activities and sales for digital solutions
Drive roadmap and release planning for digital products
Monitor market trends and regulatory requirements for competitiveness and compliance
Develop commercial guidelines and pricing frameworks
recommended_emphasis: The OR/clinical domain knowledge gap is a significant barrier — Getinge sells to hospitals and clinical teams
The strongest CV evidence is the GTM and product launch experience at IoT (IPC) and GRG Banking — frame as product operations and roadmap execution capability
Highlight the cross-functional coordination at HSBC as evidence of managing product, engineering, and marketing interfaces
A cover letter should acknowledge the healthcare domain as new but position B2B tech product experience (IPC, GRG) as the closest analogue
summary: Weak match at 35.7%. The candidate has genuine product operations and GTM experience (4 product launches at IPC, 6 product lines at GRG) and strong cross-functional coordination skills, but lacks any clinical or healthcare IT domain knowledge. Getinge's OR Solutions portfolio is specialised medical software requiring clinical workflow understanding. The English fluency and presentation experience are positive, but the domain gap is material. Low-probability application — worth only if the candidate is genuinely interested in a healthcare pivot and can articulate this credibly.
